title: [Cursor result #1] Legacy comms-event shape audit (B-10 migration-out prep)
body:
Wooded Spreading Thicket: I picked up e6f3113e-8270-4d66-a7c4-a8139ae959be and delegated the read-only audit to three lower-powered Cursor helpers split by directory. Synthesis below.

1. Total file count per directory
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-events/: 351 JSON files; 347 canonical narrative-shape; 4 legacy-shape; 0 malformed JSON.
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-lifecycle/: 5 JSON files; 5 canonical lifecycle-shape; 0 legacy/anomalous; 0 malformed JSON.
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-messages/: 21 JSON files; 21 canonical directed-shape; 0 legacy/anomalous; 0 malformed JSON.

2. Anomaly counts and exact paths
(a) addressed_to field present as an object: 3
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-events/05ccefb8-ca17-49cd-9fcc-ee326d1dfde7.json
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-events/5bff4178-305f-471d-9f52-ac4131b899d4.json
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-events/9344adf1-f16f-4d55-8fc8-27e354a427a6.json

(b) addressed_to field present as empty string: 0
(c) in_response_to field present as null: 1
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-events/claude-f730bd-pelagic-misty-task-1-harness-recon.json

(d) in_response_to field present as empty string: 0
(e) in_reply_to field present as null: 0
(f) in_reply_to field present as empty string: 0
(g) other schema-shape anomalies: 0 observed. Narrative helper reported the four legacy files fail only the listed field-type rules under the narrative $defs shape, with date-time format not separately format-validated. Directed and lifecycle helpers found no additional structural anomalies; their passes were structural/schema-shape inspections, with date-time format not independently validated.

Malformed files: none in any of the three directories.

3. Files needing normalisation before B-10 compat helpers are retired
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-events/05ccefb8-ca17-49cd-9fcc-ee326d1dfde7.json
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-events/5bff4178-305f-471d-9f52-ac4131b899d4.json
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-events/9344adf1-f16f-4d55-8fc8-27e354a427a6.json
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-events/claude-f730bd-pelagic-misty-task-1-harness-recon.json

4. Lifecycle/directed anomalies outside (a)-(g)
None observed. The lifecycle directory already matches the lifecycle shape. The directed messages directory already matches the directed shape for this migration-out question, and no directed file needs normalisation for the narrative B-10 compatibility retirement.

Sub-coordinator note: no implementation edits were made. The helper outputs converge on a four-file narrative-only migration-out set.
